questions.question_text: Explain the concept of "Grouping of Phases" in compiler design. Discuss how front-end and back-end phases are grouped, along with their significance in compiler construction.
Define regular expression. Let ∑={0,1} then what type of language does regular expression * will generate Construct a deterministic finite Automate for *.

questions.question_text: Discuss about different types of attributes? And compare S- attributed and L-attributed grammars with suitable examples.
How static storage allocation is different from stack-based storage allocation explain with neat diagrams. 2

What are Lexical phase errors, syntactic errors and semantic errors? Explain with example. How these errors are detected.
